mapper.select: SELECT ro.*, u.real_name AS student_name, b.name AS building_name, r.room_no AS room_no, rt.type_name AS repair_type_name, ru.real_name AS repair_user_name, ( SELECT MIN(rr.create_time) FROM repair_record rr WHERE rr.order_id = ro.id AND rr.operation = '派单' ) AS assign_time FROM repair_order ro LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ro.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN dorm_building b ON ro.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN dorm_room r ON ro.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN repair_type rt ON ro.repair_type_id = rt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON ro.repair_user_id = ru.id WHERE ro.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_order WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM repair_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT rt.type_name AS typeName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM repair_order ro LEFT JOIN repair_type rt ON ro.repair_type_id = rt.id GROUP BY rt.type_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT u.real_name AS repairUserName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM repair_order ro LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ro.repair_user_id = u.id WHERE ro.status IN (5, 6) AND ro.repair_user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ro.repair_user_id, u.real_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
